creator: kennethsalerno@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Conrad Meyer from comment #1)
Hi, I apologize but I just don't know where the issue is (kernel, compiler, or firmware) so my thinking was if I opened a bug with the port maintainer the compiler theory could get ruled out while the ppc arch kernel maintainers can have a look as well. If a duplicate bug was not the way to involve multiple parties, please close the kern bug and leave the ports bug open.
